meta.title: The Anime Machine: A Media Theory of Animation
meta.author: Thomas Lamarre

part1.title: Multiplanar Image
part1.core_concern: The emergence of the animetic interval and multiplanar image as an alternative to cinematism; Miyazaki's open compositing

part2.title: Exploded View
part2.core_concern: Distribution of movement across layers; from relative movement to full limited animation; Anno's exploded view and inner natures

part3.title: Girl Computerized
part3.core_concern: Gender, technology, and the post-Lacanian subject in anime; the gynoid, otaku desire, and emergent subject positions
